name: golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev
title: golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev
summary: Golang LRU cache (v2 with support for generics)
description:
Golang LRU cache (v2 with support for generics)
This provides the lru package which implements a fixed-size thread safe LRU
cache.  It is based on the cache in Groupcache.  v2 adds support for generics.
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev because Golang LRU cache (v2 with support for generics).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-hashicorp-golang-lru-v2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
